## Problem

<!-- The friction or gap you're hitting. Describe the situation,
     not the feature you want — that goes in the next section. -->

## Proposed behavior

<!-- What the plugin should do. Slash command shape, settings,
     UI element, whatever fits. -->

## Alternatives considered

<!-- What other approaches did you think about, and why you didn't
     pick them. Skip if there are no real alternatives. -->

## Additional context

<!-- Use case, frequency, who else would benefit, etc. -->
